visual_description: In a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor, a group of figures in dark, hooded robes are seen in a flurry of motion. The audio is filled with a sense of high-stakes action and urgency. A powerful, orchestral score swells with dramatic, fast-paced strings and booming percussion, creating a tense and epic atmosphere. The camera is shaky, capturing the chaotic energy as they move quickly through an arched opening. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows and obscuring many details, but the figures appear to be in a hurry, their forms blurred by the rapid movement. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera pans to the right, following a figure in a dark, hooded robe as they move through a stone archway. The figure is a silhouette, and the background is almost completely dark, with only the faint texture of the stone wall visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera continues to pan, revealing a long, dark, and cavernous hall with high, arched ceilings. The stone pillars lining the corridor are massive and imposing.
